description: FreeCAD is open with contact_blocks.FCStd, a real finite element analysis (FEM) contact mechanics model from FreeCAD's test suite. The document contains two separate steel block solids named 'TopBox' and 'BottomBox' that are positioned in contact with each other. Merge these two blocks into a single solid using a Boolean Union operation. Save the resulting model to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/fused_model.FCStd.
